overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street (Cyberpunk 2077), passing under elevated highways and approaching an industrial intersection with digital billboards and factory smokestacks. High-quality game engine footage with cinematic lighting and detailed urban environments.

black sedan passes by on the left side of the road
red van passes by on the left side of the road

black sedan following behind the yellow car

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure spanning overhead with metal supports
green construction fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
tall metal street lamp with curved arm

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The camera moves steadily forward as several vehicles including a yellow sports car and black sedan pass by on the left. The environment is industrial with concrete pillars and a green metal fence lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching intersection with digital billboards

events.description: emerging from under the elevated highway into a more open commercial area
approaching crosswalk and beginning to angle toward the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the street opens up, approaching a large digital billboard and the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying anime-style character with 'WET DREAM' text
concrete wall with red 'NO REGRETS' graffiti text
tall industrial smokestacks with red and white stripes visible in the distance
tall palm tree visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera emerges from under the highway, revealing a large digital billboard on the right displaying 'WET DREAM' and a wall with 'NO REGRETS' graffiti. Industrial smokestacks become visible in the distance as the camera approaches a wide intersection with crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with smokestacks and factory buildings

events.description: waiting at traffic light as vehicles pass through the intersection
beginning to cross the wide intersection toward the industrial area
pedestrians become visible on the far side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide asphalt intersection toward the industrial area with large smokestacks, navigating around stopped vehicles

notable_agents.action: black car stopped at the red traffic light at the intersection
group of pedestrians walking on the far sidewalk near the factory building

entered.detail: yellow horizontal traffic light gantry spanning across the intersection
modern industrial building with dark glass facade and metal framework
low industrial warehouse building with green trim and loading bays

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide industrial intersection beneath a traffic light gantry. The large smokestacks dominate the center view, now much closer, while a modern glass industrial building rises ahead. Pedestrians appear on the far side near a factory warehouse, and vehicles wait at the traffic lights as the camera moves through the crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway into a wide, open industrial intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive highway structure, passing several vehicles including a yellow sports car and a black sedan while moving alongside a green metal fence. As the camera emerges from under the overpass, the environment opens up to reveal a large digital billboard displaying WET DREAM and a wall marked with NO REGRETS graffiti. The scene then expands toward a wide intersection where distant industrial smokestacks grow larger in the frame, leading the camera beneath a traffic light gantry. Finally, the movement carries through a crosswalk toward a modern glass industrial building and a factory warehouse where pedestrians and waiting vehicles populate the urban landscape.
